This type of '''Republic command ship''' was used by the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] in [[3997 BBY]].<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Republiccommandship.jpg|thumb|left|140px|The command ship ''[[Reliance I]]'' leads a Republic fleet above [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]].]]

Command ships of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] were designed with several long engine banks arranged vertically at the stern, with several lesser banks placed along the sides of the vessel. They were similar in design to the [[Republic battleship (Great Sith War)|Republic battleships]] which served alongside them.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

The ship was equipped with shields divided into separate areas, with a forward shield used in head-on confrontations. The command ship also had a medical bay filled with [[Bacta/Legends|Bacta]] tanks, for quick treatment of wounded personnel.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTSa" />

Snubfighters were carried onboard these vessels, capable of taking off at a moment's notice when threatened by enemy fighters.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTSa" />

The command tower was a high-rise spire located halfway on the centerline of the hull. Going by the bridge of the ''[[Reliance I]]'', Republic command ships of this class had multi-level bridge areas with extensive panoramic windows, and at least one gun turret for point-defense. The bridge also had atmospheric containment shields for use in an emergency, such as breaches in the superstructure.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

==History==
During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], a ship of this kind, ''Reliance'', led a fleet of Republic warships in the [[Battle of Koros Major]]. It sustained damage by [[CX-133 Chaos fighter|Chaos fighters]] during the battle.<ref name="TOTJ:DLOTS" />

By the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], many Republic warship classes had been replaced by newer and more efficient designs. The prevailing command ship among prominent Naval officers then, was the [[Inexpugnable-class tactical command ship|''Inexpugnable''-class tactical command ship]] and the smaller [[Centurion-class battlecruiser/Legends|''Centurion''-class battlecruiser]].<ref name="KOTORCG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
